title: Immersive Pixelmon
description: Enjoy an exciting game of Minecraft surrounded by Pokemons, Quests and much more!
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Immersive_Pixelmon/BH_Immersive_Pixelmon_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/immersive-pixelmon-renewed) version.** ## Immersive Pixelmon is a modpack that aims to expand the Pixelmon mod to the maximum, making the game experience much more immersive. To do this, a multitude of mods have been incorporated with the aim of immersing players completely in the game, such as, for example, the famous Distant Horizons, among many others. As of update 4.0.0, new quests created by Nighttie have been released. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Immersive_Pixelmon/BH_Immersive_Pixelmon_description.webp) The objective of the game is to make you live a Minecraft experience as vanilla as possible, but with the incorporation of many addons that will make playing Pixelmon more fun. In addition, the terrain has also been modified, as well as a large number of mods have been added that fit perfectly with Pixelmon. 🔊 Experience an immersive atmosphere with AmbientSounds 6, Sound Physics Remastered, Visuality Reforged, Falling Leaves, Snow! Real Magic! and more lively animations with Better Combat, Not Enough Animations, and Better Third Person. 🍎 Expand survival with Farmer’s Delight, Ocean’s Delight, Nether’s Delight, Ender’s Delight, Cooking for Blockheads, and explore archaeology with Archeological and Better Archeology. 🧑🏻‍🤝‍🧑🏼 Perfect for multiplayer, with mods like Simple Voice Chat, optimization add-ons, shaders, and compatibility with Distant Horizons. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Immersive_Pixelmon/BH_Immersive_Pixelmon_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 8GB or 8192 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 8GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Immersive_Pixelmon/BH_Immersive_Pixelmon_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bwwT95hr/images/ec194e2c708a18289ae3cf00dfdee416d2b9c541.png) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bwwT95hr/images/71fbeeb9a5603197d221d121c66b717894fc6fcd.jpeg) ![Screenshots 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bwwT95hr/images/e2ca985ef64b1c95d2cc9a92eaee8d8331599890.jpeg) ![Screenshots 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bwwT95hr/images/48c6909a12df3ce86f3ced4758f248087e10f422.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
